title: Badge Component
content:
The `Badge` component is a UI element used to display status, categories, or other contextual information. It's built using `class-variance-authority` for flexible styling based on predefined variants. ## Key Exports * **`Badge`**: The React component for rendering a badge. * **`badgeVariants`**: A `cva` function that generates CSS classes based on badge variants. ## Props The `Badge` component accepts the following props: * **`variant`**: (Optional) Controls the visual appearance of the badge. Accepts one of: * `default`: The primary badge style. * `secondary`: A secondary badge style. * `destructive`: A badge style indicating a negative or destructive action/state. * `outline`: A badge with only an outline, no background color. * **`className`**: (Optional) Allows for custom CSS classes to be applied to the badge. * **`...props`**: Standard HTML attributes for a `div` element. ## Usage Example ```jsx import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; function Example() { return (
Default Secondary Destructive Outline
); } export default Example; ```
